title: Bridge Essay: Neuroscience and Sustainability: An Online Module on "Environmental Neuroscience

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Ecology/Animism** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Ecology/Animism — biophilia, nature connectedness, environmental neuroscience, neurobiophilia.

**Neuroscience and Sustainability: An Online Module on "Environmental Neuroscience".**. J Undergrad Neurosci Educ.. PMID: 30618495. Neuroscience has extensive and vital applications to environmental sustainability that have yet to be fully integrated into undergraduate education: The neurotoxicity of common chemicals and the health dangers of anthropogenic sensory noise are well known. Research on the neural bases for value-based decision making has implications for pro-environmental efforts. Neural and sensory responses to nature exposure show health benefits of such 'green' experiences. Despite these implications, the term
